message:
Improve Kafka IAM auth diagnostics and actionable hints

Replace generic credential-refresh warnings with context-rich diagnostics for profile and assume-role flows and add concrete troubleshooting hints.

Changes:
- emit structured notes for mode, region, profile, and assume_role when AWS credential refresh fails
- report oauth token refresh failure to librdkafka on empty/expired credentials in both callback paths
- improve metadata failure hints to guide broker, TLS, SASL, and IAM checks
- tighten diagnostic source location to the aws_iam block anchor

This makes assume-role failures much easier to diagnose than the previous generic empty-credentials warning.
